research_problem.problem_statement: To evaluate the accuracies of BDS-3 PPP-B2b real-time orbit and clock products and their impact on single/dual-frequency PPP positioning, compared with IGS RTS products.
research_questions: How accurate are PPP-B2b real-time orbits and clocks compared to IGS RTS products?
How does the use of PPP-B2b products affect single-frequency and dual-frequency PPP accuracy in static and dynamic modes?

experiments.description: Static PPP test using B1I+B3I dual-frequency and B1C single-frequency with PPP-B2b and IGS RTS products.
grounding_quotes: In the static positioning test, the 3D positioning accuracy of B1I+B3I dual-frequencies PPP and B1C single-frequency PPP are centimeter-level while using PPP-B2b service

experiments.description: Dynamic vehicle test using B1I+B2b dual-frequency and B2b single-frequency PPP with PPP-B2b service.
grounding_quotes: the positioning accuracies of B1I+B2b dual-frequency PPP are about 50 cm and 120 cm in horizontal and vertical components, which are close to those of B2b single-frequency PPP using PPP-B2b service.

main_results.summary: PPP-B2b orbits have radial accuracy 9.42 cm, along 21.26 cm, cross 28.65 cm, slightly lower than IGS RTS orbits. PPP-B2b clock accuracy 0.18 ns is better than IGS RTS. Static B1I+B3I and B1C PPP achieve centimeter-level accuracy with PPP-B2b, but horizontal components are slightly worse than IGS RTS. Dynamic B1I+B2b PPP yields ~50 cm horizontal, ~120 cm vertical accuracy.
key_findings: PPP-B2b orbit accuracy is 9.42 cm (radial), 21.26 cm (along), 28.65 cm (cross), slightly lower than IGS RTS orbits.
PPP-B2b clock bias accuracy is 0.18 ns, higher than IGS RTS.
Static B1I+B3I and B1C PPP with PPP-B2b achieve centimeter-level 3D accuracy, but horizontal accuracy is slightly lower than IGS RTS.
Dynamic B1I+B2b PPP accuracy is about 50 cm horizontal and 120 cm vertical, similar to B2b single-frequency PPP.
grounding_quotes: Results illustrate that the orbits accuracies of PPP-B2b orbits are 9.42 cm, 21.26 cm, and 28.65 cm in the radial, along-track, and cross-track components, which are slightly lower than those of real-time orbits provided by the four IGS centers.
the accuracy of PPP-B2b clock biases is 0.18 ns, which is higher than those provided by IGS Real-Time Service (RTS).

the 3D positioning accuracy of B1I+B3I dual-frequencies PPP and B1C single-frequency PPP are centimeter-level while using PPP-B2b service, which is slightly lower in horizontal components compared to those obtained based on IGS RTS products.
the positioning accuracies of B1I+B2b dual-frequency PPP are about 50 cm and 120 cm in horizontal and vertical components, which are close to those of B2b single-frequency PPP using PPP-B2b service.

correction_types.orbit_correction: Radial, along-track, cross-track corrections with respect to broadcast ephemeris, transformed to ECEF
grounding_quotes: BDS-3 PPP-B2b orbit and clock products are corrections with respect to the broadcast ephemeris. The orbit correction coordinate is related to the satellite-fixed coordinate system in radial, along-track, and cross-track directions.
Thus, the orbit corrections should be transformed into the ECEF system to correct the satellite positions from the broadcast ephemeris [26].

research_problem.problem_statement: PPP-B2b RT-PPP based on practical kinematic data and BDS-3 new signals (B1C and B2b) has hardly been studied.
research_questions: What is the accuracy of real-time orbit and clock products from various sources (broadcast ephemeris, PPP-B2b, CAS, DLR, GFZ, WHU)?
How do these products perform in kinematic dual- and single-frequency RT-PPP using B1C+B2b observations?
research_problem.knowledge_gap: Limited studies on PPP-B2b RT-PPP with practical kinematic data and BDS-3 new signals (B1C/B2b).

technical_route.overall_flow: Evaluate accuracy of real-time orbit and clock products from broadcast ephemeris, BDS-3 PPP-B2b, CAS, DLR, GFZ, WHU, and WHU ultra-rapid; then assess positioning accuracy of kinematic dual-/single-frequency RT-PPP using B1C+B2b data.
key_steps: Recovery of PPP-B2b real-time orbit and clock offsets
Transformation of orbit corrections to ECEF
Dual- and single-frequency PPP modeling
Kinematic positioning performance assessment
grounding_quotes: Therefore, this contribution will present a comprehensive performance evaluation on the real-time orbit and clock products provided by broadcast ephemeris, BDS-3 PPP-B2b, CAS, DLR, GFZ, and WHU, as well as the ultra-rapid products from WHU. The performance of the kinematic dual-and single-frequency RT-PPP is analyzed with B1C+B2b observation data collected in Beijing, China.

method.algorithm_details: PPP models include single-frequency and dual-frequency processing; orbit and clock corrections are applied from real-time SSR streams.

main_results.summary: PPP-B2b orbit accuracy is lower than IGS RTS, but clock accuracy is better. BDS-3 PPP-B2b achieves cm-level static positioning and submeter-level dynamic positioning. IGS RTS is more accurate overall but internet-dependent, while PPP-B2b uses satellite broadcast and has greater future potential.
key_findings: PPP-B2b orbit accuracy is lower than IGS RTS (CAS, DLR, GFZ, WHU), but clock accuracy is better.
BDS-3 real-time orbit and clock from PPP-B2b are more accurate than GPS.
Static dual-frequency B1I+B3I PPP using PPP-B2b achieves cm-level accuracy, better than GPS L1+L2.
Static single-frequency B1C PPP using PPP-B2b achieves 10-20 cm accuracy.
Vehicle-borne dual-frequency B1I+B2b PPP achieves submeter-level (horizontal) and meter-level (vertical).
IGS RTS is more accurate but requires internet; PPP-B2b uses navigation signal broadcast with inter-satellite link technology.
limitations: IGS RTS products are limited by internet connection.
Orbit accuracy of PPP-B2b is lower than IGS RTS.
grounding_quotes: the orbit accuracy of PPP-B2b SSR products is lower than these of IGS real-time products (CAS, DLR, GFZ, and WHU). However, the clock accuracy of PPP-B2b is better than these of IGS real-time products.
the accuracy of the real-time orbit and clock of BDS-3 provided by PPP-B2b is higher than that of GPS.
the BDS-3 B1I+B3I PPP positioning accuracy using the PPP-B2b service is centimeter-level which is better than that of GPS L1+L2 PPP.
the dual-frequency B1I+B2b PPP positioning accuracy in the vehicle-borne test achieved submeter-level and meter-level in horizontal and vertical components

IGS RTS are limited by the connection of the internet. Additionally, BDS-3 PPP-B2b introduces inter-satellite link technology and broadcasts SSR information by navigation signal, which gives it more significant potential
